arguments.argument: if initObj=1 { xx=view_xview[0]+scrAreaX if scrAreaY=0 yy=view_yview[0]+5 else if scrAreaY=1 yy=view_yview[0]+251 draw_sprite_ext(sprite_index,0,xx,yy,1,1,0,c_white,image_alpha) draw_set_font(fnt_HUDnum) draw_set_alpha(image_alpha) draw_set_halign(fa_middle) textDropShadowExt(tutorialTitle,xx,yy+1,textColorMain,c_black,1,13,190) draw_set_halign(fa_left) draw_set_font(fnt_EnemyName) textDropShadowExt(tutorialInfo,xx-94,yy+19,textColorMain,c_black,1,13,190) }
